particulars.description: All that and those lands and premises comprised in a deed of conveyance dated 17 may 1984. between (1) john oliver hasson and (2) bernard joseph mcdaid and mary kathleen mcdaid. (Registered at the registry of deeds on 6 june 1984 with serial no. 87 69) which said lands and. Premises are situate at and known as 19 clarendon street, londonderry, BT48 7EP.

persons_entitled.name: The Governor and Company of the Bank of Ireland
